calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: SD-057 wanting!=liking channel-write forced-contact microdiagnostic (V3-EXQ-514o precursor)
items.note: Diagnostic precursor de-risking the full V3-EXQ-514o goal_pipeline:GAP-2 successor BEFORE a multi-seed curriculum run. V3-EXQ-514n FAILed substrate_not_ready_requeue (n_scored_wl_steps=0 / run_bank_populated=false on guard-passing seed42 despite distinct_tokens_max=3, drive_spread 0.012>floor). CO-TIMING ROOT CAUSE (code-confirmed): 514n's eval sourced the LIKING target via scaffolded_sd054_onboarding._contacted_resource_type(obs_dict), which reads obs_dict['resource_type_at_agent']=_resource_type_grid[ax,ay]; the env CLEARS that cell at consumption so it reads 0 post-step -> rtype=None at every contact -> bank.update never fired in the eval AND the scorer's (rtype is not None) gate never held. The consumed tag lives in info['sd049_consumed_type_tag_this_tick'] (NOT obs_dict). This micro FORCES contact (benefit+consumed-tag supplied directly, 626b-style, decoupled from foraging) and proves the SD-057 IncentiveTokenBank channel-write + WL scoring fires: C1 constructed-bank instrument separates 1.0 (=514n readiness leg-1); C2 real agent + bank, forced liking alternating vs drive-favored wanting -> >=2 tokens, >=5 scored, wl_frac>=0.3; C3 null/parity (liking==wanting) -> wl_frac~0; C4 structural assert consumed tag in info NOT obs_dict + resource_type_at_agent in obs_dict (the literal 514n bug). claim_ids=[] (diagnostic; weights no claim). Smoke PASS 2026-06-14 dry-run: C1 sep=1.0, C2 scored=6 wl_frac=0.500 distinct=2 populated=True, C3 wl_frac=0.000, C4 consumed_in_obs=False/consumed_in_info=True/at_agent_in_obs=True -> overall PASS. validate_experiments --strict + validate_queue clean. PASS -> source the liking target from info in V3-EXQ-514o.

items.title: MECH-057b hippocampal trajectory promotion gate (672a non_contributory requeue)
items.note: Requeue of V3-EXQ-672a (governance-reclassified non_contributory 2026-06-14). 672a's completion gate fired correctly (C3 PASS, ~40% candidates filtered) but C6_baseline_not_collapsed FAILED -- goal_success_rate=0.0 in BOTH arms. ROOT CAUSE = instrumentation bug (NOT a substrate ceiling): the eval loop read info['resource_collected'], a key CausalGridWorldV2.step() never emits; the env signals collection via info['transition_type']=='resource' (causal_grid_world.py:1608/2227). So goal_success was structurally 0.0 in every arm and C6 could never pass. 672b FIX (both scope-preserving; the MECH-057b completion gate _filter_trajectories_by_completion is byte-identical to 672a): (1) read goal success from transition_type=='resource' [load-bearing]; (2) num_resources 1->3 for C6 margin (identical both arms; num_hazards stays 2 so the C1 harm-reduction contrast remains measurable). Standalone probe confirmed the baseline forages (0.05-0.10 at num_resources=1). MECH-057b currently has ZERO genuine experimental evidence (exp_conf 0, lit_conf 0.857); 672b is the first run that can move it. Smoke PASS 2026-06-14: dry-run C6 PASS (baseline goal_success>0), gate engaged (filtered_fraction 0.41, non_degenerate=True, label 'ready'); C1/C2 now MEASURABLE (FAIL only at the 2-ep dry scale, the full run is the real test). validate_experiments --strict + validate_queue clean.

items.title: EXP-0380 MECH-423 super-additivity 3-arm ablation (680b: hardened PASS criterion; supersedes 680a)
items.note: MANUAL proposal EXP-0380 (no EVB backlog_id; EVB-0380 is a DIFFERENT proposal=SD-027). Supersedes V3-EXQ-680a, which RAN and recorded a PASS/supports for MECH-423 (manifest v3_exq_680a..._20260614T191656Z_v3) on a METHODOLOGICALLY WEAK margin: it scaled the super-additivity noise on the across-seed SD of the baseline LEVEL (pstdev(iso_scores)), not the SD of the DELTA -- which collapses toward 0 on a reproducible substrate so a trivially-small consistent positive delta can clear an ~0 margin and falsely report supports. On 680a's OWN data (delta_pair=[+1.57,+1.24,-1.19]) the effect is not reliably positive (2 seeds strongly super-additive, 1 strongly sub-additive) yet it cleared the level-scaled margin 0.1024 on 2/3 seeds. 680b ONLY tightens the PASS gate: margin = max(SUPERADD_SD_MULT*pstdev(delta_pair), SUPERADD_MIN_EFFECT_FLOOR=0.02) -- noise on the SD of the delta itself, hard-floored by an absolute minimum super-additive effect size (combined world_R2+affordance_R2 units; > the 1e-3 inertness guard). Sub-floor / high-variance positive deltas now route to additive_below_margin/inconclusive, never supports; 680a's data -> inconclusive under the new gate. FAIL/weakens (mean_delta<=0) and FAIL/inconclusive branches preserved verbatim; the change is strictly TIGHTER (margin can only rise) so it cannot manufacture a false PASS. Identical 3-arm ISOLATED/INTEGRATED_PAIR/INTEGRATED_TRIPLE ablation + P0 R1/R2/R3 readiness gate -> substrate_not_ready_requeue. claim_ids=[MECH-423], evidence. GOVERNANCE: mark the 680a manifest evidence_direction=superseded at next governance (weak-criterion PASS; do not let it keep weighting MECH-423). Smoke: validate_experiments --strict OK + --dry-run runs all 3 arms + readiness gate; margin floored at 0.02 (vanishing-margin pathology closed).
